mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, status, current_version_id, created_time, updated_time, created_by, updated_by, deleted FROM script WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE script SET status = #{status}, current_version_id = #{currentVersionId}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
